headline: Forget Vistra. One Quarter of Orders at GE Vernova Exceeded All of Last Year. That Is the AI Power Trade Worth Owning
summary: Everyone’s talking about Vistra (NYSE:VST) right now because retail investors have decided the merchant power producer is the cleanest way to bet on AI data center electricity demand. But here’s what you should actually be watching. Vistra is a single-commodity bet. Its earnings power tracks wholesale power prices, and the bull case leans heavily on ... Forget Vistra. One Quarter of Orders at GE Vernova Exceeded All of Last Year. That Is the AI Power Trade Worth Owning

headline: Assessing Honeywell International (HON) Valuation As Mixed Momentum And Spin Off Plans Shape Expectations
summary: Recent performance snapshot Honeywell International (HON) has traded with mixed momentum recently, with the stock up around 1.9% over the past day but down about 0.9% over the past week and 7% over the past month. Over the past 3 months, the stock is down roughly 10.5%. The year to date return is about 10.9%, and the 1 year total return sits near 4.7%. This provides investors with a mixed picture over both the near term and the longer term. See our latest analysis for Honeywell...
